channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran envoy says Tehran will keep Strait of Hormuz open
item.description: Iran’s UN envoy Amir Saeid Iravani said Tehran will not close the Strait of Hormuz and remains committed to freedom.

item.title: Qatar rejects attempts to ‘drive wedge’ with US over gas pause
item.description: Qatari official denies political motives for decision to halt LNG production following Iranian strikes.

item.title: US military announces rescue effort after fuelling aircraft crashes in Iraq
item.description: No deaths have been reported so far, but the military said the crash involved two aircraft, one of which landed safely.

item.title: Air attacks target bases of Iran-backed forces in Iraq
item.description: Air attacks have targeted military bases across Iraq belonging to Iran-backed forces.

item.title: Netanyahu says Israel ‘stronger than ever’ in first speech since Iran war
item.description: Prime minister says US-Israeli war prevented Iran from moving its nuclear and ballistic projects underground.

item.title: Fuel shortages bring queues, protests around the world
item.description: Rising fuel prices have caused long queues and protests around the world as the US-Israeli war on Iran rages.

item.title: Advocates push for major probe as US boat strikes in Latin America kill 157
item.description: The Inter-American Commission on Human Rights is set to hold first hearing on US's alleged extrajudicial killings.

item.title: How will the war on Iran impact the US economy?
item.description: Outcomes depend on how quickly oil tankers can return to the Strait of Hormuz, experts said.

item.title: Does President Trump have an exit strategy for the war with Iran?
item.description: United States officials are issuing contradictory statements on the war's timeline and objectives.

item.title: Iran vows to make Trump pay for ‘grave miscalculation’ if US escalates war
item.description: Ali Larijani responds to US threat to hit Iran's power infrastructure, saying the 'whole region will go dark'.
